mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO biz_notice_user (notice_id, user_id, is_read, create_time) VALUES
(#{noticeId}, #{userId}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_notice_user nu INNER JOIN biz_notice n ON nu.notice_id = n.id WHERE nu.user_id = #{userId} AND nu.is_read = 0 AND n.status = 1 AND n.is_deleted = 0
